data.title: Dow Jones Futures surge, S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit all-time highs. Broadcom rises, Tesla falls post-record deliveries.
data.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached new record highs while Broadcom showed a buy signal amidst a surge in popular stocks. Tesla's stock dipped despite achieving record deliveries. This trend led to a positive market outlook, with Dow Jones Futures hitting new highs as Broadcom and other top-performing stocks rallied.

data.title: Nasdaq hits high, Dow rises as gov. shutdown suspends data. Tesla stock surges on strong Q3 deliveries.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase amidst the suspension of economic data due to the government shutdown. Tesla stock showed a significant increase following strong Q3 deliveries. The Nasdaq also reached a new high despite Tesla and silver experiencing a decline. The dynamics of the stock market were captured in live coverage by Investor's Business Daily, with a focus on metal plays that were thriving.

data.title: Proficient Auto Logistics to report Q3 2025 results on Nov 11, 2025, with an investor call at 5:00 pm EST. Press release at 4:00 pm EST. Join via links provided.
data.description: Proficient Auto Logistics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PAL) based in Jacksonville, Fla., revealed plans for an investor conference call scheduled for November 11, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. EST. The purpose of the call is to delve into the operating and financial outcomes for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. Preceding the call, a press release will be issued around 4:00 p.m. EST on the same day. Interested investors can participate in the conference call by signing up through the provided link: https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIe26e8494ebd64ec0b74db5f313cf00f9. Upon registration, a unique pin and dial-in details will be shared to enable access to the call. Alternatively, individuals can opt for the listen-only Webcast through https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/tj5pzvgh.

data.title: America Haunts praises top haunted attractions for excellence in horror, setting standard. Kansas City, Oct 2, 2025 -PRNewswire.
data.description: Some renowned haunted houses in Kansas City have become the benchmark for horror experiences across the country. These iconic attractions have excelled in creating terror, standing out in a sea of temporary scares. As of October 2, 2025, they continue to attract visitors, establishing themselves as leaders in the industry.

data.title: New generic abortion pill approved by F.D.A, sparking backlash among pro-life advocates.
data.description: The announcement has sparked outrage among anti-abortion groups, who have been lobbying for the government to limit access to abortion medication.

data.title: Millrose Properties (NYSE: MRP) announces Q3 2025 earnings release for Sep 30, before market opens on Oct 23, with a 10:00 AM ET conference call.
data.description: In Miami, Millrose Properties, Inc. (NYSE: MRP) revealed it will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluded on September 30, 2025, prior to the market opening on Thursday, October 23, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 10:00 AM ET. Interested individuals can access the conference call, webcast, and related earnings information via the investor relations section.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield completed term loan repricing, reducing interest rate by 25 basis points to 2.50%, involving $840M.
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) has completed the repricing of around $840 million of its Term Loan issued in January 2025, which was due in January 2030. The repricing resulted in a 25 basis points reduction in the applicable interest rate on the Term Loan, decreasing it from Term SOFR plus 2.75% to Term SOFR plus 2.50%. The maturity of the Term Loan remains the same post-repricing, with all other terms remaining largely unchanged. This move by Cushman & Wakefield aims to optimize its financial obligations and improve its overall loan terms.

data.title: Pet King Brands introduces ZYMOX® Funky Paws® to combat odor and soothe pet skin. Veterinary strength cream launched in Oct 2025.
data.description: A new veterinary strength cream for paws, noses, and folds has been added to the acclaimed line of enzymatic pet health products. Pet King Brands, known for their veterinarian-recommended ZYMOX Dermatology and Oratene® brands, introduced the cream in Austin, Texas on October 2, 2025. This addition further enhances their range of products catering to pet health needs.

XOMA extends tender offer to acquire LAVA Therapeutics N.V., aiming for a lucrative deal.

data.title: Elcora's Management Cease Trade Order revoked by Nova Scotia Securities Commission, allowing trading of common shares.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on Oct. 2, 2025, ELCORA ADVANCED MATERIALS CORP. (TSX.V: ERA | Frankfurt: ELM0 | OTCQB: ECORF) announced that the Nova Scotia Securities Commission (NSSC) has lifted the Management Cease Trade Order (MCTO) granted to the Company on July 30, 2025, under National Policy 12-203. This decision comes after the Company completed all necessary filings for its Annual and Interim Financials. The revocation of the MCTO now allows the CEO, CFO, and directors to resume trading the Company's common shares.
Bank reserves fall for eighth week, extend drop to $2.98 tln.

data.title: Pinnacle West to release 2025 Q3 financial results on Nov 3, 2025, before US markets open.
data.description: Pinnacle West Capital Corp., based in Phoenix, is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Monday, November 3. The report will be made public before the opening of U.S. financial markets on that day.

data.title: EQT Corp (NYSE: EQT) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 21, host conference call to discuss further details.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, EQT Corporation announced it will disclose its third quarter financial and operating results after the market closes on October 21, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as EQT, intends to conduct a conference call for investors to discuss the outcomes and pertinent issues.

data.title: GrafTech (NYSE:EAF) to host Q3 2025 Earnings Call on Oct 24 at 10:00am (EDT) to discuss financial results.
data.description: GrafTech International Ltd., listed on NYSE as EAF, is set to conduct its Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on October 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). During this event, senior management will review the financial performance for the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025, along with discussing ongoing business strategies. The detailed financial report is scheduled to be disclosed before the market opens on October 24, 2025, and interested parties can access this information through the investor relations webpage.

data.title: CF Industries sends low-carbon ammonia to Envalior through Trafigura, with 23,500 metric tons loaded for shipment.
data.description: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. made known that a shipment of certified low-carbon ammonia, produced at its Donaldsonville, Louisiana facility, was sent out. Trafigura, a major player in global commodities, procured the ammonia for delivery to Envalior, a top Engineering Materials firm. Envalior plans to employ the low-carbon ammonia for manufacturing low-carbon caprolactam. As part of this transaction, Trafigura loaded 23,500 metric tons of ammonia for transportation.
